verdict_reasoning: HSPA5/GRP78/BiP is canonically an ER-luminal chaperone. However, it is well-documented to translocate to the cell surface under stress conditions including oncogenic transformation, viral infection, ER stress, and immunogenic cell death. Surface GRP78 has been exploited as a cancer-cell-selective target by antibodies, ADCs, and bispecifics (e.g., anti-GRP78 antibody programs in multiple solid tumors). The surface pool is absent or minimal in most normal adult tissues but present on tumor cells and stressed/infected cells, qualifying as cell_state_induced contextual surface biology.
